title: Stream Ops Introduction
summary: We have begun the documentation of Stream Ops - the embeddable data streaming engine for Java. Stream Ops enable you to write data records into a stream which is stored on disk, and read the records in the same order again later.
content: We have begun the documentation of Stream Ops - the embeddable data streaming engine for Java. Stream Ops enable you to write data records into a stream which is stored on disk, and read the records in the same order again later.
